title: The Wistful Widow of Wagon Gap
writer: Robert Lees, Frederic I. Rinaldo, John Grant
actors: Bud Abbott, Lou Costello, Marjorie Main
plot: Chester Wooley (Lou Costello) and Duke Egan (Bud Abbott) are traveling salesmen who make a stopover in Wagon Gap, Montana en route to California. During the stopover, notorious criminal Fred Hawkins is murdered and the two are cha...
